prompts.title: 水獭科学家演示文稿 Slides
prompts.prompt: 一张照片级逼真的幽默学术演示场景，位于会议室内：一只拟人化的水獭科学家站在画面左侧，身穿干练的白色实验服，手持一根细长的指示棒，指向画架上的大型演示项目。这只水獭像人类一样直立，拥有逼真的棕色皮毛、深色的爪子和专业的姿态。实验服上缝着一个写有“Dr. Otter”的姓名牌，下方写着较小的一行字“Aquatic Systems Lab”，胸前口袋里插着两支笔。水獭的脸部被一个方形模糊块部分遮挡。水獭身后是一个白板，上面有模糊的手写笔记和涂鸦，包括“WiFi > Fish”、“H2O”、“Hydration”、一条鱼的草图以及一个 WiFi 符号。画面的焦点是一张大型且清晰的演示 Slides，具有锐利易读的文字和精致的企业学术布局。顶部是一个粗体标题，写着“{argument name="headline text" default="Ethan Mollick 的水獭测试"}”，下方副标题写着“提示词：\"{argument name="prompt text" default="一只水獭坐在飞机座位上，用笔记本电脑使用机上 WiFi"}\"”。下方是一个名为“AI 生成图像样本”的方框区域，包含 4 张并排的样本图像，展示了逼真的水獭坐在飞机座位上使用笔记本电脑或平板电脑，每张图像都像模型输出一样被框起，其中一张在座位上方显示了一个巨大的 WiFi 符号。图像下方是一个标有“性能结果（通过 = 水獭、飞机座位、机上 WiFi、笔记本电脑/平板电脑）”的部分，包含 5 个分数框：“DALL·E 3”无可见数字分数，“GPT-4o”为“4/4”和“100%”，“Midjourney v6”为“3/4”和“75%”，“Stable Diffusion XL”为“2/4”和“50%”，以及“SD 1.5”为“0/4”和“0%”。右侧是一个醒目的高亮方框，写着“平均分”和“{argument name="average score" default="70%"}”，字体为蓝色大号字。Slides 底部是一个“关键发现”框，包含 3 个要点：“现代模型对复杂、具体提示词的理解能力令人惊讶。”、“水獭 + 飞机 + WiFi = 一个可靠的基准测试。”以及“进一步的研究非常有必要（otter-ly necessary）。”Slides 右下角有一个简单的卡通水獭涂鸦。房间光线温暖，墙壁为木质镶板，景深较浅，前景中有几位模糊的听众，包括边缘处的一台笔记本电脑，屏幕上显示着一张水獭图像，桌上放着一个玻璃水壶。风格：超写实编辑摄影，冷面科学讽刺，可信的会议演示，高细节，自然室内光线，专业镜头压缩，易读的 Slides 排版，精致而荒诞。

prompts.title: 漫画/故事板 - 史诗奇幻战士风景
prompts.prompt:
An epic fantasy landscape digital illustration featuring a {argument name="subject" default="solitary hooded warrior"} standing atop a rocky outcrop, gazing toward a {argument name="landmark" default="distant medieval castle"}. The figure is rendered in silhouette, wearing dark leather armor and a flowing hooded cloak. They grip a longsword in one hand and hold aloft a glowing lantern with warm amber-orange light in the other, creating a striking contrast against the cool tones of the environment.
The landscape is dominated by a breathtaking mountainous vista with:
Towering rocky cliffs rising dramatically on both sides, creating a natural amphitheater
A grand Gothic castle perched majestically atop a distant cliff, with multiple spires and towers silhouetted against the sky
A cascading waterfall visible in the misty background, adding movement and grandeur to the scene
Dense coniferous forest of evergreen trees scattered across the mountainous terrain at various elevations
Thick, atmospheric mist and fog swirling through the valleys and around the cliffs, creating depth and mystery
Color palette and atmospheric elements:
{argument name="color theme" default="Cool blue-teal color grading"}: Dominates the entire scene, creating a serene yet mysterious atmosphere
Warm golden glow: The lantern provides a focal point of warmth and hope
Dramatic cloudy sky: Overcast with hints of pale light, featuring silhouettes of birds in flight formation
Volumetric lighting: Mist and fog particles catch light, creating atmospheric depth and dimension
Monochromatic blues and teals: With touches of amber and earth tones
Mood and thematic elements:
Epic and cinematic: Reminiscent of fantasy films and video game concept art
Adventurous yet contemplative: The lone figure suggests a hero's journey or quest
Majestic and awe-inspiring: The scale of the landscape dwarfs the individual
Mysterious and otherworldly: The mist and lighting create an almost dreamlike quality
Hope and determination: The glowing lantern symbolizes perseverance in darkness
Art style: High-quality digital fantasy illustration; concept art aesthetic with cinematic lighting and atmospheric effects; reminiscent of fantasy RPG artwork, Lord of the Rings-inspired visuals, or video game concept design
tags: 漫画 / 故事板 - 史诗奇幻战士风景

prompts.title: 个人资料/头像 - 日落海边玫瑰人像
prompts.prompt: Create a vibrant square sunset portrait of a young woman in a seaside rose garden, using {argument name="character identity" default="a natural young woman with long dark hair"} as the identity concept. Frame her from mid-torso upward, centered close to camera, standing among blooming red roses with the ocean horizon behind her. The sun is low on the left, glowing over the water with strong golden backlight, sparkling reflections, warm lens flare, and rim light outlining her hair and shoulders. She has long dark brown to black hair parted near the center and styled into exactly 2 loose braids falling over the front of her shoulders. She wears a soft cream-white cottagecore blouse with puff sleeves, lace trim, a gathered neckline, a small front bow tie, and a delicate tiny pink floral print. Pose her playfully with exactly 2 raised hands, one on each side of her face, each making a peace sign; keep fingers elegant and natural. Surround her with whimsical neon doodle effects: exactly 2 glowing butterflies, one larger butterfly above the top right of her head and one smaller butterfly near the roses to her right; add colorful hand-drawn rainbow light trails, sparkles, tiny hearts, and confetti-like strokes around her hair and shoulders. Make the background lush and slightly blurred, with multiple red rose blossoms and green leaves visible, but keep the subject sharp. Use dreamy golden-hour photography, cinematic bokeh, high detail, natural skin tone, realistic hair texture, cheerful magical-garden mood, and saturated but tasteful colors. {argument name="face treatment" default="preserve a realistic natural face, unobstructed"}. Avoid text, watermark, extra people, distorted hands, extra fingers, duplicate faces, or heavy cartoon rendering.
tags: 个人资料 / 头像 - 日落海边玫瑰人像

She is a graceful young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="very long flowing silver-blue hair"}, seen in a three-quarter back pose, her hair and translucent ribbons streaming dramatically to the right as if moved by a gentle night wind; keep her face softly obscured or turned away, with no sharp facial details. prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 动漫全局光照对比
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a side-by-side comparison graphic demonstrating global illumination / indirect bounce lighting improvement on the same anime illustration.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 horizontal image, split exactly into two equal vertical panels with a thin white divider line down the center. Use a soft pastel anime illustration style with dreamy morning light.

Layout: The left panel is labeled “Before” at the top-left and shows the normal version; the right panel is labeled “After” at the top-right and shows the enhanced version with warmer indirect light, natural contact shadows, and soft glow wrapping around the subject. Add a large centered headline across the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="プロンプト比較：光の回り込みGI"}. Add bottom-left Japanese label {argument name="left bottom label" default="通常生成"} on the left panel and bottom-right Japanese label {argument name="right bottom label" default="光の回り込みGI"} on the right panel. All overlay text is bold white with a dark drop shadow for readability.

Subject details: Show the same androgynous anime boy in both panels, seated indoors in a cozy bedroom by a bright window. He has fluffy layered {argument name="hair color" default="white-silver"} hair with lavender shadows, pale skin, and a slim elegant build. His face is intentionally covered by one large opaque pale mauve square censor block centered over the face in each panel; use exactly 2 censor blocks total, one per panel. His right hand rests near his cheek, partially visible beside the censor block. He wears a luxurious white robe or kimono-like top with navy-blue inner layers and wide sleeves, trimmed with metallic silver edges, decorated with star and crescent moon motifs. Include a crescent moon pendant necklace with a dangling blue gemstone.

Background details: The room contains exactly 1 large window visible behind the subject, soft curtains, a bed or cushioned seat, a small shelf or windowsill with perfume bottles and ornaments, and exactly 1 hanging crescent-moon decoration on each panel. The palette is lavender, white, pale blue, and warm sunlight.

Lighting comparison: Left “Before” panel should look flatter and cooler, with less bounce light and weaker shadows. Right “After” panel should visibly improve depth: add soft global illumination, warm sunlight wrapping around hair, face area, hands, robe folds, and shoulders; add subtle contact shadows where the hand touches the face area and where sleeves overlap; add bloom near the window and brighter rim light on the hair. Keep the character pose and composition identical between panels.

Constraints: Countable elements must remain exact: 2 comparison panels, 1 vertical divider, 4 text labels total, 2 face censor blocks, and 2 hanging crescent decorations. No watermark, no extra logos, no additional panels.
tags: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 动漫全局光照对比

Their faces are pressed very close together, cropped tightly so the composition fills the entire frame; show only partial hair, cheeks, mouths, jawlines, and the upper edges of dark chunky knit sweaters. Capture a candid, hyper-realistic editorial photography style with high-fidelity skin texture, natural pores, slight freckles, subtle cheek flush, realistic teeth and gums, crinkled nearly closed eyes from intense joyful laughter, and authentic imperfect expressions. Use a dark minimalist background and moody cinematic color grading with deep desaturated tones, warm raw skin undertones, high contrast, and soft dramatic directional key light catching fine strands of hair and sculpting the noses, brows, lips, and cheek contours. Shot as if on {argument name="camera look" default="35mm film"}, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the center where the faces meet, dark textured knitwear around their necks, raw intimate atmosphere, award-winning fashion editorial realism. prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - Krea K2 Large 五格展示
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a tall vertical showcase collage demonstrating the artistic range of {argument name="model name text" default="Krea K2 Large"}, split into exactly 5 stacked horizontal panels with no outer border and minimal spacing between panels.

Canvas: Vertical social-media image, approximately 9:16 aspect ratio. Each panel spans the full width. Use cinematic, high-detail rendering with different art styles per panel.

Layout: Exactly 5 horizontal bands from top to bottom:
1. Top panel: black-and-white pencil manga sketch of a teenage boy floating or falling with arms outstretched between very tall dense city skyscrapers, viewed from a dramatic overhead/oblique perspective. The buildings are drawn with loose architectural linework, hatching, and sketch marks; the boy is centered, wearing a simple T-shirt, shorts, and sneakers, hair tousled, expression serious.
2. Second panel: dark epic fantasy/sci-fi scene of a colossal whale-like flying battleship or armored leviathan moving through storm clouds over rugged mountains. It has a glowing red eye and heavy biomechanical plating. There are explosions and fire bursts on its back, smoky clouds, orange tracer streaks, and small bird silhouettes in the lower right. Moody gray lighting with dramatic contrast.

prompts.title: 头像 / 档案照 - 档案级高保真照片修复
prompts.prompt:
Please perform "archive-grade high-fidelity restoration + modern high-end {argument name="camera brand" default="Sony"} full-frame camera texture reconstruction" on the old photo I provided.

Core Goal:
Not to redraw it or simply beautify it, but to repair damage, blur, overexposure, and missing details to the maximum extent while strictly adhering to the original content. The final effect should be as close as possible to what a modern high-end {argument name="camera model" default="Sony Alpha"} full-frame camera would produce if it captured that same moment.

Strict Requirements:

1. Absolute Fidelity to the Original
Retain original composition, person's position, expression, posture, gaze, clothing, hairstyle, and the environment. Do not change identities or modernize features artificially.

2. Restoration Priorities
Fix highlights, whitening, blur, grain, scan damage, and resolution loss. Restore realistic textures of skin, hair, and fabric. Avoid plastic skin or fake AI sharpening.

3. Modern Photography Texture
The texture should resemble modern photography with high resolution, natural sharpness, clean transitions, and professional lens quality. It should look like real photography, not CG or an illustration.

4. Realism First
Prioritize photographic logic over "looking pretty." Any colorization should be conservative and documentary-style, avoiding saturated filters.

5. Negative Constraints
No excessive skin smoothing, no modernization of makeup, no plastic or oil painting effects. Do not redraw the old photo into a "new AI image."

Final Keyword Direction:
High-fidelity restoration, archival restoration, real photography, {argument name="quality style" default="full-frame texture"}, natural high resolution, subtle micro-contrast, credible colorization, documentary, faithful to original.
tags: 头像 / 档案照 - 档案级高保真照片修复

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 日式天妇罗面条食谱卡
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a warm Japanese recipe-card style food image for {argument name="dish name" default="えび天のせ あっさり和風麺"}, presented like a polished magazine recipe poster with appetizing food photography and neatly typeset instructions.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, soft natural daylight, cream and pale wood background, clean editorial composition. Use a light beige paper texture and muted pastel accents.

Layout: Large Japanese headline centered at the top in bold brush-calligraphy style. Under it, a thin salmon-pink divider line and a subtitle line with dotted decorations. Main food photo occupies the middle: a large bowl on the left foreground, a smaller bowl in the right background, and a plate of toppings on the lower right. Bottom third contains one rounded white recipe panel divided into exactly 3 columns.

Main image details: Show a clear light Japanese noodle soup in white ramen bowls with red decorative Chinese-style patterns. The large foreground bowl contains thin noodles, clear broth, exactly 1 large golden shrimp tempura laid across the top, sliced green onions, glossy wakame seaweed, and pink pickled ginger. The smaller background bowl contains noodles, sliced green onions, and pink pickled ginger. On the lower-right plate, show exactly 2 topping groups: neatly fanned round slices of pink-rimmed kamaboko fish cake and overlapping slices of chashu pork. Add a folded pale green cloth under the large bowl and a small leafy green plant blurred in the upper right.

Text content: Top headline: {argument name="headline text" default="えび天のせ あっさり和風麺"}. Subtitle: {argument name="subtitle text" default="チャーシューとかまぼこを添えて"}. Small description line: {argument name="description text" default="家庭で気軽に作れる、ほっとするごちそう麺。"}.

Bottom recipe panel: Use exactly 3 columns with rounded header pills. Column 1 header in salmon pink: 「材料（2人分）」. List exactly 9 ingredient rows: ゆで麺 2玉; えび天 2本; チャーシュー 8〜10枚; かまぼこ 6〜8枚; 小ねぎ 適量; 紅しょうが 適量; 青菜またはわかめ 適量; だし 600ml; しょうゆ 大さじ1; 塩 少々. Column 2 header in ochre: 「作り方」. Show exactly 4 numbered steps in gold circles: 1 鍋でだしを温め、しょうゆと塩で味を整える。 2 麺を温めて器に入れ、熱いだしを注ぐ。 3 えび天、ねぎ、紅しょうが、青菜をのせる。 4 チャーシューとかまぼこは別皿に盛って添える。 Column 3 header in olive green: 「POINT」. Show exactly 3 bullet points: だしは薄めにして具のうま味を活かす; ねぎと紅しょうがは仕上げにのせる; 別皿にすると好みでトッピングしやすい.

Visual style: High-key appetizing food photography blended with elegant Japanese cookbook graphic design, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic textures for tempura, broth, noodles, pork, and kamaboko. Typography should be legible and balanced, with black headline text and warm accent colors. Add a tiny decorative red shrimp illustration and subtle green swoosh in the lower-right corner of the recipe panel.

Constraints: Keep the composition clean and calm, avoid clutter, no people, no watermark, no extra panels, no extra ingredients beyond those listed, and preserve the exact 3-column bottom panel structure.

Bottom-left belongings panel: Title it 「❖ そうび・もちもの ❖」. prompts.title: 前后端数据库 SaaS 信息图
prompts.prompt: 01 前端（用户看到的部分） 是什么：前端就是界面，是用户能看见、能点、能操作的部分。 在哪里：网页、小程序、App 的界面。 用什么做：HTML（结构）、CSS（样式）、JavaScript（交互）。 02 后端（背后处理的部分） 是什么：后端就是幕后大脑，负责逻辑和运算。 在哪里：服务器上，用户看不见。 作用： 处理登录注册 计算价格、推荐商品 接收前端请求、返回数据 常用的编程语言：Java、Python、Go、JavaScript（Node.js） 03 数据库（记忆的部分） 是什么：数据库就是用来存储和管理数据的。 存什么：账号、密码、订单、库存… 常见的数据库： MySQL、PostgreSQL（关系型，像表格一样） MongoDB（文档型，像文件夹一样） 04 SaaS（软件即服务） 是什么：SaaS = Software as a Service（软件即服务）。 核心特点： 打开网页/小程序/APP就能用 按月或按年订阅 常见形式：网站、移动 App、小程序都可以是 SaaS。 05 总结 前端：用户看到和操作的界面 后端：背后运行的逻辑和计算 数据库：存放和管理数据的地方 SaaS：把软件做成服务，用户随时通过网络使用 前端展示 → 后端处理 → 数据库存储 → SaaS 是交付方式 帮我针对上面的内容画一张易于理解的图
tags: 前后端数据库 SaaS 信息图

prompts.title: 充气橙汁海报
prompts.prompt: for the summers GPT Image 2 on ChatGPT Prompt: Design a '4:5' product poster for an 'orange' juice 3d bottle using playful inflatable-plastic packaging surrealism where the bottle behaves like a squeezed toy object mid-pressure. The poster should communicate juiciness, tension, and tactile freshness through a bottle that visibly bulges, stretches, and compresses like a soft object being squeezed from the inside out. SUBJECT: A single bottle dominates the center-left, illustrated in a semi-3D stylized form (not photoreal). The bottle is visibly distorted—its midsection bulges outward while the neck is slightly compressed, as if internal juice pressure is pushing against the container walls. The liquid inside exaggerates this effect, forming rounded convex surfaces pressing against the plastic. The cap is slightly tilted from pressure. The bottle feels elastic, alive, and reactive rather than rigid. COMPOSITION: The composition mechanic is “internal pressure distortion”. The eye enters through the most inflated part of the bottle (center bulge), then follows curved tension lines outward toward stretched typography on the right side. The camera uses a slightly low, close-up perspective with mild fisheye distortion, amplifying the sense of pressure and expansion. The bottle leans diagonally into the frame as if pushing against invisible resistance. Negative space on the right is intentionally stretched and warped, echoing the bottle’s deformation. TYPOGRAPHY: Headline: “SQUEEZE BACK” in thick, rounded, inflated lettering that mimics air-filled plastic. The type is physically distorted—letters stretch horizontally near the bottle and compress toward the edges, as if affected by the same pressure force. The headline sits to the right of the bottle but partially overlaps its bulging edge. Subheadline: “Juice that pushes back.” in a narrow condensed sans, straight and rigid, contrasting the soft headline. Small circular microcopy labels (e.g., “100% organic”, “no added sugar”) appear like printed stickers slightly warped by the surface tension. LIGHTING / GRAPHIC TREATMENT: Soft studio lighting adapted for stylized rendering—broad diffused highlights across curved surfaces, subtle specular streaks that follow the deformation. No realistic reflections—only controlled, simplified highlight bands that emphasize volume and elasticity. COLORS: 'orange' juice bottle color and 3d header text. Small accents of 'bright lime green' for sticker elements. High contrast between glowing orange and dark surroundings. BACKGROUND: A smooth dark gradient field with subtle radial tension lines expanding outward from the bottle, like invisible pressure waves. No texture clutter—clean but dynamically warped space. STYLE: Neo-pop surreal product illustration with inflatable material logic, playful distortion, and high-impact commercial clarity. FINISH: Soft plastic-like rendering, clean edges, controlled gradient transitions, no noise or grain, polished but intentionally stylized surface behavior. FOOTER: A compact floating sticker cluster in the bottom-right corner containing a small brand placeholder, a circular “fresh batch” seal, and minimal product info arranged like packaging labels. NEGATIVE: Avoid realistic photography, static bottle poses, generic splash effects, centered symmetry, rigid typography, template layouts, clutter, excessive gloss, low detail, and stock advertising aesthetics.

The layout is split into two main columns with a pale cream and warm gray background, thin divider lines, elegant serif typography, and muted sage-green accents. At the top left, include the small heading “LIFESTYLE / FEATURE”, then a large date line reading “{argument name="event date" default="4.26"} EVENT”, followed by the large Japanese title “よい風呂の日” and the subtitle “特集” in sage green, with a small bathtub icon nearby. Beneath that, add the Japanese tagline “心も体も、ととのう時間。” and several short body-text blocks in Japanese explaining the meaning of Good Bath Day, including references to “4(よ)2(ふ)6(ろ)” and the benefits of bathing for body and mind. On the right side, show a bright, airy bathroom interior lit by soft natural morning light from a window, with beige and off-white tones, a wooden counter, folded white towels, a pump bottle, a sponge, woven baskets, and a few green plants. In front of the bathroom scene, place a youthful anime-style person with {argument name="hair color" default="soft medium brown"} tousled short hair, fair skin, and a relaxed expression, standing in a casual post-bath pose. The character wears a loose white T-shirt with a tiny dark square chest logo and light brown drawstring lounge pants, one hand in a pocket and the other holding a white towel up near the face and shoulder, conveying a fresh, just-bathed feeling. Near the character, include the handwritten-style Japanese side note “湯上がりの、リラックスタイム。” Add an oval badge on the lower right of the main image area with the English heading “GOOD BATH DAY” and Japanese explanatory text inside, plus a small bathtub icon. Below the main feature, include exactly 2 small inset images of the same character in the bathroom, each framed as rectangular mini-panels with narrow vertical Japanese captions beside them. At the bottom, create exactly 4 rounded rectangular information cards in a row: card 1 labeled “POINT 01” with the heading “お風呂の基本” and text about soaking in lukewarm water around 38–40°C; card 2 labeled “POINT 02” with the heading “日常でできること” and text about making bathing part of a routine instead of only showering; card 3 labeled “POINT 03” with the heading “楽しみ方・取り入れ方” and text about bath salts, scents, music, and lighting; card 4 labeled “まとめ” with concluding Japanese text about sustainable self-care. Place a final handwritten-style Japanese phrase at the lower right reading “自分をいたわる時間を。” The overall look should be clean, gentle, wellness-focused, feminine-neutral, and polished like a Japanese seasonal magazine infographic, with delicate anime illustration, soft shadows, subtle textures, and calm spa-like atmosphere.
